name: The believers are asked to fight those who hindered their efforts in the cause of God
introduction:
and acted with hostility towards them merely because they sought to fashion human life
according to the revealed guidance of God. Earlier, when they were weak and scattered, the
Muslims were asked merely to preach and be patient with the wrongful repression meted
out to them by their opponents. However, now that a small city state had been established
in Madina they were commanded for the first time to unsheathe their swords against those
who had resorted to armed hostility against their movement of reform. It was some time
after this injunction that the Battle of Badr took place, to be followed by several other battles.
